scope: Static PWA, release automation, development dependencies, vendored runtime, data and live endpoints
acceptedRisks: GitHub Pages cannot send a report-only Content-Security-Policy header; meta enforcement is deferred until the documented compatibility test passes.
Basemap tile requests reveal viewed map tiles to OpenFreeMap; precise browser geolocation is never added to a URL or telemetry event by this application.
tier3Rule: Every Tier 3 update must update this review when trust boundaries, data flows, dependencies, permissions, analytics, routing or service-worker behaviour change.
